sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12837" key="a)pokladeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποκλᾰδεύω</orth>, <sense id="n12837.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lop off the branches,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ph.Bybl.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:1:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
